title: BOQ Section
description: One section's items, added from templates and priced line by line.

steps.title: Section items
steps.description: Each line carries a description, unit, quantity and rate.
steps.voiceScript: This section's items are listed here, each with its unit, quantity and rate.
steps.captionText: This section's items are listed here, each with its unit, quantity and rate.
steps.fallbackMessage: Section items: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Open the grid
steps.description: The grid is the fast way to add many items.
steps.voiceScript: Open the grid to add and price many items quickly.
steps.captionText: Open the grid to add and price many items quickly.
steps.fallbackMessage: Open the grid: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Section total
steps.description: The section rolls up into the floor bill.
steps.voiceScript: The section total rolls up into the floor bill.
steps.captionText: The section total rolls up into the floor bill.
steps.fallbackMessage: Section total: not visible on this screen yet.
